title: So This Is Paris
writer: Henri Meilhac, Ludovic Halévy, Hanns Kräly
actors: Monte Blue, Patsy Ruth Miller, George Beranger
plot: Georgette lives in Paris with her unexciting, effeminate husband, Maurice. Suzanne lives across the street, spending her time reading romance novels, while dreaming of someone more exciting than her own lackluster spouse, Paul. Bo...
